entity_name: SK Innovation/SK On Georgia Battery Facility
canonical_name: SK Innovation Battery Complex / Hyundai-SK On Joint Venture
facts: SK Innovation operates a massive Li-ion battery complex in Georgia.
The facility strategically serves Hyundai, Kia, and Ford.
Projected output for the Georgia battery complex is 25+ GWh by 2026.
Hyundai and SK On are forming a joint venture in Georgia to supply U.S.-assembled EVs.
